CustomField.description:
Source: AirCastle Asana: Anticipated Remarketing Status
This field defines the remarketing strategy for this aircraft. The value is set on the lease page and referenced from the aircraft in campaign section of a marketing campaign. Choices are Placement, Last Lease / Part-Out, Potential Extension, Sale Evaluating for Potential Sale. The choice of the strategy helps commercial teams make decisions on which prospects to engage
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field defines the remarketing strategy for this aircraft. The value is set on the lease page and referenced from the aircraft in campaign section of a marketing campaign. Choices are Placement, Last Lease / Part-Out, Potential Extension, Sale.
CustomField.label: Anticipated Remarketing Status
